mul.guidance: Use the formal title of the office as it appears in governing documents. Examples: "Principal Chief of the Cherokee Nation", "President of the Navajo Nation", "Chairperson of the Oglala Sioux Tribe"

mul.prompt: short description identifying the office and jurisdiction
mul.guidance: Format: "head of state/government office of [jurisdiction]" Example: "head of government office of the Cherokee Nation"

mul.prompt: alternative titles or historical names for this office
mul.guidance: Include common abbreviations, historical titles, or informal names.

mul.prompt: the primary classification for the office (fixed to "public office" for this profile)
mul.consequences_message: Without a value, the item has no type classification, making it impossible to apply type-specific validation, constraints, or display logic.

mul.prompt: provide the internet address for a reference
mul.consequences_message: Without a value, the claim lacks a sourcing link, reducing verifiability and trustworthiness of the associated statement.
